heading: Failure by broker to provide notice to payors
label: 6705 Failure by broker to provide notice to payors
notes: Effective DateSection effective with respect to payments made after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1983 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 1983section 110(a) of Pub. L. 98–67section 31 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective with respect to payments made after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1983 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 1983section 110(a) of Pub. L. 98–67section 31 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Any person required under section 3406(d)(2)(B) to provide notice to any payor who willfully fails to provide such notice to such payor shall pay a penalty of $500 for each such failure.

children.heading: Penalty in addition to other penalties
children.label: b Penalty in addition to other penalties
children.text: Any penalty imposed by this section shall be in addition to any other penalty provided by law.
